description: omo-agents lifecycle hooks: todo-continuation enforcement, dangerous command interception, and post-edit LSP reminder

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const todos=(h.tool_response&&h.tool_response.todos)||[];const incomplete=todos.filter(x=>x.status!=='completed');if(incomplete.length>0){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] '+incomplete.length+' todo(s) remaining. Sisyphus: continue to next task.\n');}}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const f=(h.tool_input&&(h.tool_input.file_path||h.tool_input.path))||'file';process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] File edited: '+f+'. Remember to check LSP diagnostics for type errors before marking task complete.\n');}catch(e){}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const h=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(h.tool_input&&h.tool_input.command)||'';const dangerous=[/rm\s+-rf\s+[\/~]/,/git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)\b/,/DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)\s/i,/chmod\s+777\s+-R/,/mkfs\./,/dd\s+if=.*of=\/dev/];const hit=dangerous.find(p=>p.test(cmd));if(hit){process.stdout.write('[omo-agents] ⚠️  DANGEROUS COMMAND DETECTED: '+cmd.slice(0,120)+'\nThis command matches a dangerous pattern. Please confirm you intend to run this.\n');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}})"
